title: Bad Day at Black Rock
writer: Millard Kaufman, Don McGuire, Howard Breslin
actors: Spencer Tracy, Robert Ryan, Anne Francis
plot: Following World War II, a one-armed stranger arrives in a tiny California desert town, but finds the residents hostile and protecting a terrible secret they want to keep hidden, by violent means if necessary.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 4 wins & 8 nominations total
